scripts.eval:guardrail: NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' promptfoo eval -c evals/guardrailCheck.yaml --output evals/output/results/guardrailCheck-results.json
scripts.eval:analysis: NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' promptfoo eval -c evals/mealAnalysis.yaml --output evals/output/results/mealAnalysis-results.json
scripts.eval:safety: NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' promptfoo eval -c evals/safetyChecks.yaml --output evals/output/results/safetyChecks-results.json
scripts.eval:all: npm run eval:generate && npm run eval:guardrail && npm run eval:analysis && npm run eval:merge-meal && npm run eval:safety && npm run eval:score
